title: Warden Fight: Reimagined
description: A vanilla-like overhaul of the warden boss fight
body:
# How does the bossfight work?
- An all-new bossbar will appear when a warden is summoned, or when a players gets close enough to a warden.
- Once the warden reaches half health, it will begin the **Deep Dark Summoning Ritual**, and particles will begin to appear on the ground as the Deep Dark approaches the surface.
- The deep dark will break through and begin to infect the ground below the warden, infecting any block it stands on.
- Just before it dies, the warden unleashes the **Sculk Lunge**, and sculk blocks will begin to fall onto the player, dealing damage upon impact.

The warden now has a chance to drop the **Silence Armor Trim**.
